hit the target to unlock

↑

click/tap to throw

for nicole joelle.

Happy Birthday to the kind of person people write films and songs about.

You have the kind of soul that turns ordinary places into beautiful memories.

Some people are loud with their existence, but you leave your mark quietly, deeply, and permanently.

You make life feel cinematic in the softest way possible.

You belong to late-night playlists, old bookstores, coffee stains on paper, and conversations people never forget.

You are art without trying to be.

The world feels more interesting because you exist in it.

You carry warmth in the most effortless way.

You are the type of person that makes others feel understood without needing many words.

Your presence feels like nostalgia for something I never want to lose.

Happy Birthday to someone genuinely rare.

I hope life stays soft with you.

I hope you always find beauty in small things, even on difficult days.

You deserve friendships, love, and moments that feel honest and real.

Thank you for being one of the safest and most beautiful souls I’ve ever met.

You make people feel seen.

And that is a very special thing.

Some people pass through life quietly,
but somehow still change the atmosphere of every room they enter.

You are one of those people.

Thank you for existing exactly the way you do.
The world genuinely feels softer, deeper, and more beautiful with you in it.

Happy Birthday, Nicole Joelle.
